name: frontend
description: User-invoked router for frontend and web-design skills. Type this skill name to see which frontend skill to use.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

# Frontend Router

Index of the frontend and web-design skills. Invoke the right skill by name; high-frequency skills also auto-trigger.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `frontend-design` | Build a distinctive web component, page, dashboard, or application. |
| `frontend-slides` | Create or convert a zero-dependency HTML presentation. |
| `web-design-reviewer` | Inspect a running website and fix design/layout/responsive/accessibility issues at the source. |
| `theme-factory` | Apply a professional color/font theme to slides, docs, or an HTML artifact. |
| `visualization` | **Router** — see `visualization` for chart, diagram, and figure skills. |

If the user asks to "build a website" / "make a page" / "design a UI", invoke
`frontend-design`. Use this router only when the user explicitly names
`frontend` or asks "which frontend skill?"
